commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an `already-running` gateway service start outcome, skips service-manager restart when the service is already running, updates CLI output, adds focused tests, and adds a changelog entry for the linked bug.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows a login-shell env probe can source `~/.profile`, invoke `openclaw gateway start`, and then reach `service.restart()` even when `readGatewayServiceState` reports the service runtime as running.
commands.review_followup: The PR is the right narrow fix, but the provided metadata shows it is not currently mergeable and still needs maintainer review plus Testbox changed-gate validation.

target.title: fix(gateway): make `gateway start` idempotent when already running
